tabs.label: Data Integration & Management
tabs.heading: Data Integration & Management
tabs.body: Data Factory helps orchestrate the data movement between various data sources. It is used to ingest, move, transform, and process the data before storing into a centralized platform.

tabs.label: Data Engineering & Warehousing
tabs.heading: Data Engineering & Warehousing
tabs.body: This is your one-stop shop for data warehousing and exploration. Synapse Analytics provides a unified workspace to build and manage data pipelines as well as analyze the data through SQL queries. It simplifies data preparation and analysis for faster insights.

tabs.label: Data Science & Real-Time Analytics
tabs.heading: Data Science & Real-Time Analytics
tabs.body: Powered by Apache Spark, Databricks is an open source platform for big data processing, machine learning, and advanced analytics on massive datasets to discover hidden insights and patterns.

tabs.label: Business Intelligence (BI) & Reporting
tabs.heading: Business Intelligence (BI) & Reporting
tabs.body: Power BI offers a comprehensive data visualization suite for creating interactive dashboards and reports. Connected with Microsoft Fabric, transform your data into clear and powerful visuals, allowing you to easily understand and communicate insights.
